embeds.description:
# 🔄 FORZA HORIZON 6 — UPDATE GUIDE

-# ─────────────────────────────────
## 1️⃣ Apply Game Updates

Go to the FitGirl repack page and download **RUNE updates only**, applied **one at a time in order**:

> https://fitgirl-repacks.site/forza-horizon-6/

**Update order:**
1. `Forza.Horizon.6.Update.v360.259-RUNE.rar`
   -# Unlocks more DLCs than the initial crack.
2. `Forza.Horizon.6.Update.v364.933-RUNE.rar`
3. `Forza.Horizon.6.Update.v375.327-RUNE.rar`

⚠️ Apply them **sequentially** — running multiple at once will corrupt your game.

-# ─────────────────────────────────
## ⚙️ If RUNE Updates Fail

Go back to your **original FitGirl download** and install the **Extra Languages** and **HD Videos** optional components — RUNE updates sometimes require these files to be present. Once installed, try applying the updates again from Step 1.

-# ─────────────────────────────────
## 📢 Stay Up To Date

This guide may fall behind the latest releases. For the most current info:
- **FitGirl comments** on the page above
- **CS.RIN.RU thread:** https://cs.rin.ru/forum/viewtopic.php?f=41&t=151803&hilit=forza+horizon+6
